implement: Valmar Airflo 5500 pull-type air boom applicator (40-foot boom)
original_entry:
Phosphorus and Potassium were spread on all plots , except the unfertilized prairie plots.
John Deere 6420 tractor and Valmar 550 air spreader with 40 ft boom were used.
Two passes were made per plot, 5ft on each plot edge was used as a buffer to prevent overlap.
Appication Rates: P2O5 (MAP - 48% P2O5) = 235lbs/acre, K2O (KCl - muriate of potash) = 290lbs/acre
